response.justification: Candidate has only ~6 months of C++ exposure (National Instruments, 2014-2015) over a 15+ year career dominated by JavaScript/TypeScript, DLang, and Node.js. There is no fixed income, capital markets, or investment banking experience, and no demonstrated SQL Server/Oracle or Windows-platform focus. The mandatory technical and domain requirements for this role are not met.
strengths: Strong overall software engineering background with 10+ years across web, mobile, and embedded
Exposure to low-latency, high-throughput systems at Dunnhumby/Sociomantic
Generic SQL listed among skills and prior work with relational databases
concerns: Only ~6 months of C++ experience, over a decade ago, far below the 5–10 year requirement
No fixed income, capital markets, or investment banking domain experience
No evidence of SQL Server/Oracle or Windows-platform development

key_factors.factor: No capital markets / fixed income domain
